article_title: 模块化单体的边界：一次后来很难收回的拆分
core_theme: 模块边界在信息最少时被画下，后来会被真实的一致性需求检验。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解为什么边界要保持可验证，以及为什么不确定时应先保留更粗的模块。
summary_angle: 两个看似清楚的模块，随着即时正确性要求出现，被越来越多连接重新拉回一起。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Day one: Catalog and Collaboration as two cleanly separated modules
information_blocks.visual_idea: 两个模块被干净的玻璃板隔开，只保留轻量联系。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Catalog and Collaboration a year later, linked by events, two reads, and a synchronous price check
information_blocks.visual_idea: 连接线逐渐增多，读数据、事件、价格检查一起穿过边界。

information_blocks.source_anchor: The business needed an order to be correct now
information_blocks.visual_idea: 计时器和闪电强调保存时价格必须马上正确。

information_blocks.source_anchor: Splitting one coarse module into two is cheap and low risk; merging two modules back into one is expensive and risky
information_blocks.visual_idea: 破裂边界与成本符号表达后期合并的代价。

main_metaphor: 两块模块化积木之间的玻璃边界逐渐被连接线和裂纹占满。
primary_subject: 被连接线穿透并开始裂开的模块边界
subject_action: 边界从清晰隔离变成难以撤回的耦合点
composition: 左右推进的四段宽幅分镜，中心边界作为主焦点
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；清线风适合表达模块关系、边界和连接变化，细节清楚且不过度渲染。
style_safety_note: 该风格为通用漫画视觉描述，不指向特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家。
draft_goal: 验证边界从清晰到难以撤回的叙事能否在宽封面里被看懂。
revision_targets: 避免生成真实系统图或假 UI
final_prompt: Use case: infographic-diagram. Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article. Create a 2.35:1 isometric conceptual systems scene with European clear-line comic style. Show two clean modules separated by a glass boundary, then the boundary filling with cables and cracks as consistency requirements grow. Keep four short Chinese labels only: 第一天, 连接增多, 即时正确, 合并很贵. No poster title, no long sentences, no fake UI, no dashboard, no fake terminal, no fabricated metrics.
